b3b0b075286d.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
b3b0b075286d.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
b3b0b075286d.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

ab47bedb393a.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
ab47bedb393a.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
ab47bedb393a.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

8d1a241d8b34.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
8d1a241d8b34.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

93d127169227.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
93d127169227.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
93d127169227.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

acf607d064d1.title: Ranked #5 of 6 locally — peers are ahead
acf607d064d1.description: At percentile 20.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

01eb6a99ee1e.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
01eb6a99ee1e.description: You trail peers by 1.1 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

4ae5cc56d96c.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
4ae5cc56d96c.description: At 40 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
